---
title: "Thermal perception"
description: "Combination of thermal sensation, thermal preference and thermal acceptability data into one figure."
categories: ["Survey data", "R"]
code-r: "https://github.com/CenterForTheBuiltEnvironment/chart-library/blob/main/src/R/plots/thermal-perception.R"
code-python: None
code-contributor: "T. Kramer"
---

```{r thermal-perception, fig.width = 89/25.4, fig.height = 170/25.4}
#| file: "../../src/R/plots/thermal-perception.R"
#| code-fold: true
#| echo: true
#| eval: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| out-width: 80%
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-dpi: 300
```


::: {.callout-note}
**Code:** [View R code on GitHub]({{< meta code-r >}})  ·  Added by {{< meta code-contributor >}}
:::
